entries.dlg.martial_artist_intro.intro_1: Hey. You move like someone who's trained hard.
entries.dlg.martial_artist_intro.intro_2: I train to protect people, not to show off.
entries.dlg.martial_artist_intro.choice_training: Only if this helps my training.
entries.dlg.martial_artist_intro.accept: Good answer. Let's test your fundamentals in a spar.
